description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:10 Docker image. Define three stages: setup, test, and build, and configure a cache keyed by $CI_BUILD_REF_NAME that stores the node_modules/ directory and includes untracked files. Add a setup job in the setup stage that runs npm install. Add a test job in the test stage that runs npm run lint. Add a build job in the build stage that runs npm run build, and ensure all jobs use the defined cache.
